name: onesearch
description: Onesearch CLI provider bridge and MCP replacement skills for Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Onesearch CLI and provider bridge skills.
interface.longDescription: A standalone local plugin for Onesearch CLI workflows. It bundles the main Onesearch router skill plus provider and workflow bridge skills for Context7, Exa, Tavily, Firecrawl, DeepWiki, documentation lookup, and original MCP tool-name replacement.
defaultPrompt: Use $onesearch-mcp-tools to route original MCP tool names.
